page_metadata.biotools__summary: scDALI (single-cell differential allelic imbalance) is a statistical model and analysis framework that leverages allele-specific analyses of single-cell data to decode cell-state-specific genetic regulation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: scDALI (single-cell differential allelic imbalance) is a statistical model and analysis framework that leverages allele-specific analyses of single-cell data to decode cell-state-specific genetic regulation.
